task_description: Implement Phase 2 (Reliability) of NexusQueue: at-least-once delivery via BLMOVE, explicit ACK, retry with exponential backoff, Dead Letter Queue, and idempotency keys.

verification.summary: Build compiles all 3 workspaces cleanly. All 19 tests pass (10 Phase 1 + 9 Phase 2). Tests exercise real code paths through processOne() and enqueue(), verify state transitions in Redis and Postgres mock, and use fake timers for exponential backoff validation.
